mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT databasename FROM session_metrics_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND databasename IS NOT NULL ORDER BY databasename
SELECT DISTINCT state FROM session_metrics_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND state IS NOT NULL ORDER BY state
SELECT DISTINCT wait_event_type FROM session_metrics_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND wait_event_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY wait_event_type

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'active') AS activeCount, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'idle in transaction') AS waitingCount, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'idle') AS idleCount, COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM session_metrics_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM session_metrics_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} )

SELECT session_metric_id, database_id, collected_at, pid, username, databasename, client_addr, application_name, state, wait_event_type, wait_event, wait_class, bottleneck_cause, impact_level, wait_duration_sec, blocking_pid, xact_start, query_type, query, query_start, query_age_sec, cpu_usage, memory_usage_mb, lock_type, lock_duration_ms, is_deadlock, created_at FROM session_metrics_raw WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND pid = #{pid} AND collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM session_metrics_raw WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) LIMIT 1
